test.note: Focused tests passed including TestApplyEscalateContractProposal and TestEscalationFieldsRoundTrip. Full suite times out but that's a known baseline issue per mission.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit requirement for workers to commit ALL changes before handoff. The worker committed tests but left struct changes and implementation logic uncommitted. Workers should verify 'git status --porcelain' is empty (or only shows expected artifacts) before calling EndFeatureRun.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: contract-freeze-escalation-fields-and-tests-fix committed 67f59ee with tests but left escalation fields (types.go) and field-setting logic (service.go) uncommitted. Tests only pass with uncommitted changes present.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add verification step: run 'git diff --stat' after 'make build' and 'make test' to ensure all implementation changes are committed. The worker appears to have done incremental commits of test files while leaving implementation uncommitted.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The worker ran 'git add internal/service/service_test.go' and committed only the test file, not the accompanying types.go and service.go changes.

fixChainSummary.originalFailure: contract-freeze-final-success-gate-and-escalation-path failed round 1 due to missing RequiredAttestation escalation fields and no unit tests
fixChainSummary.firstFixAttempt: contract-freeze-escalation-fields-and-tests-fix added tests but failed to commit struct fields and implementation logic (round 2 failure)
fixChainSummary.successfulFix: contract-freeze-commit-escalation-slot-implementation-fix (commit 5cadef5) properly committed all escalation fields and logic, tests now pass against committed code
